summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hishab Nikash Pro Phase 2 - All backend APIs working perfectly (17/17 tests passed), frontend pages loading successfully with one critical bug fixed in Accounts Receivable component. All new Phase 2 features functional including Expenses, Inventory, AR, AP, and Reports modules.

working_endpoints: POST /api/companies/ckfrozen/expenses - Creates new expense successfully (201 status)
GET /api/companies/ckfrozen/inventory-valuation - Returns valuation data with breakdown
GET /api/companies/ckfrozen/receivables - Returns AR data with aging buckets
GET /api/companies/ckfrozen/payables - Returns AP data with vendor balances
GET /api/companies/ckfrozen/reports/sales - Returns sales report with top customers
GET /api/companies/ckfrozen/reports/expenses - Returns expense report with category breakdown

fixed_bugs.issue: Missing Cell import from recharts causing component crash

minor_issues.issue: Chart width/height warnings in console (-1 dimensions)
minor_issues.impact: Visual warnings only, charts render correctly

working_features: Expenses List page loads with 16 expense rows (15 seeded + 1 test)
Add Expense page loads with form and validation
Inventory List page loads with 15 inventory items and KPI summary
Inventory Valuation page loads with charts and category breakdown
Accounts Receivable page loads with aging chart and customer balances
Accounts Payable page loads with vendor balances and recent expenses
Reports Hub loads with navigation to all report types
Profit & Loss report loads with monthly chart and P&L statement
Sales Report loads with top customers and monthly trend
Expense Report loads with category breakdown and vendor analysis
Sidebar navigation works for all Phase 2 routes
All data-testid attributes present for testing automation

passed_tests: Backend API: All 17 Phase 2 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Backend API: GET /api/companies/ckfrozen/expenses returns 15 expenses
Backend API: POST /api/companies/ckfrozen/expenses creates expense with 201 status
Backend API: GET /api/companies/ckfrozen/inventory returns 15 inventory items
Backend API: POST /api/companies/ckfrozen/inventory/{item_id}/adjust adjusts stock
Backend API: GET /api/companies/ckfrozen/inventory-valuation returns valuation data
Backend API: GET /api/companies/ckfrozen/receivables returns AR aging data
Backend API: GET /api/companies/ckfrozen/payables returns AP vendor data
Backend API: GET /api/companies/ckfrozen/reports/profit-loss returns P&L data
Backend API: GET /api/companies/ckfrozen/reports/sales returns sales report
Backend API: GET /api/companies/ckfrozen/reports/expenses returns expense report
Frontend: Expenses page loads with expense table and Add Expense functionality
Frontend: Inventory page loads with stock table and Valuation navigation
Frontend: Inventory Valuation page loads with charts and KPIs
Frontend: Accounts Receivable page loads with aging chart and customer balances
Frontend: Accounts Payable page loads with vendor balances and expenses
Frontend: Reports Hub loads with navigation to all report types
Frontend: Profit & Loss report loads with monthly chart
Frontend: Sales Report loads with top customers and products
Frontend: Expense Report loads with category and vendor breakdown
Frontend: Sidebar navigation works for all Phase 2 routes

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all pages working, minor chart warnings only)
